package.name: hexa_kinematics_cpp
package.description: C++ port of hexa_kinematics: forward / inverse kinematics, body frame transforms, and the IK and joint-command-bridge nodes. The pure library (leg geometry, IK, leg specs, body transforms, joint config) links without rclcpp and is unit-testable standalone; only the node executables touch ROS. Built side-by-side with the Python hexa_kinematics until the cutover. The gait engine (hexa_gait_cpp) consumes this library through a namespace alias (hexa_gait::kin).
